if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != '' and dateType != null and dateType != ''

choose.when: AND l.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND l.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')
AND l.upd_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND l.upd_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

if.test: searchValue != null and searchValue != '' and searchTypes != null and searchTypes != ''

where.if: AND (1=0 OR l.req_ip LIKE '%'||#{searchValue}||'%' OR l.user_id LIKE '%'||#{searchValue}||'%' )

mapper.select:
SELECT /* base.sy :: SyhAccessLogMapper :: selectPageList */ l.log_id , l.req_method , l.req_host , l.req_path , l.req_query , l.req_ip , l.req_ua , l.app_type_cd , l.user_id , l.role_id , l.dept_id , l.vendor_id , l.locale_id , l.resp_status , l.resp_time_ms , l.server_nm , l.profile , l.thread_nm , l.ui_nm , l.cmd_nm , l.file_nm , l.func_nm , l.line_no , l.trace_id , l.req_dt , l.reg_date FROM shopjoy_2604.syh_access_log l
ORDER BY l.req_dt DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(l.*) /* base.sy :: SyhAccessLogMapper :: selectPageCount */ FROM shopjoy_2604.syh_access_log l
